{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bronze Door
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A vast bronze door exists at the end of the [[library]], shaped like a perfect circle with no visible hinges.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The bronze door's surface is covered in symbols and diagrams resembling ancient astronomy texts.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
